ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Trigger autocomplete on printable keystroke that are not word separators
ast.target: 在可打印字符（非单词分隔符）上触发自动补全

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Trigger autocomplete only when there are at least n characters in the last word
ast.target: 仅当最后一个单词至少包含 n 个字符时才触发自动补全

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Auto select suggestion if there is only one
ast.target: 如果只有一个建议则自动选择

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Use CTRL-P/N bindings to trigger autocomplete. Be aware of keybinding clash on Windows (ctrl-n)
ast.target: 使用 CTRL-P/N 绑定触发自动补全。请注意 Windows 上的键绑定冲突（ctrl-n）
